title: leobordea adpressa subsp. leptantha
intro: Leobordea adpressa subsp. leptantha, also known as Cape fig marigold, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Leobordea adpressa subsp. leptantha has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
